sections.paragraph:
Original: אגּן

Transliteration: 'aggân

Phonetic: ag-gawn'

BDB Definition:

  1. bowl, basins
    1. basins used in ritual
    2. human body (metaphorically), curves of the body (simile)
    3. of family of Eliakim (metaphorically)

Origin: probably from H5059

TWOT entry: 20a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
